setup-worktree-unix: [ -n "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/blockchain/trc20-token/.env" ] && mkdir -p blockchain/trc20-token && cp "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/blockchain/trc20-token/.env" blockchain/trc20-token/.env && echo 'Copiado .env' || true
setup-worktree-windows: if ($env:ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH) { $p = Join-Path $env:ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH 'blockchain/trc20-token/.env'; if (Test-Path $p) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path blockchain/trc20-token | Out-Null; Copy-Item $p blockchain/trc20-token/.env; Write-Host 'Copiado .env' } }
